task_summary: Added bio (TEXT NULL) and avatar_media_id (CHAR(36) NULL, FK -> media_references ON DELETE SET NULL) columns to the users table via a single reversible migration (1780892561355-user-bio-and-avatar.ts). UserEntity updated with bio, avatarMediaId column mappings and avatarMedia ManyToOne relation following the BlogPostEntity pattern. Migration registered in database.config.ts reviewedMigrationClasses. Existing test fixtures in auth.service.test.ts and database.config.test.ts updated as mechanical consequence of entity shape change. All 381 tests pass; workspace typecheck and lint clean.
final_test_outcomes: pnpm typecheck clean; pnpm lint clean.
assumptions: Shared artifact directory: artifacts/milestone-4-forums/ST13 (provided by coordinator).
Plan 'none here' documentation guidance applies to feature/endpoint docs only; api-conventions.md migration list requires updating.
acceptance_criteria: Migration applies cleanly on MySQL 5.7.44 and is reversible; entity updated and registered. VERIFIED (tester).
pnpm typecheck and the API tsc build pass. VERIFIED (tester).
all_modified_files: apps/api/src/database/migrations/1780892561355-user-bio-and-avatar.ts (Implementer: new migration adding bio and avatar_media_id columns)
apps/api/src/users/entities/user.entity.ts (Implementer: added bio, avatarMediaId columns and avatarMedia ManyToOne relation)
apps/api/src/auth/auth.service.test.ts (Tester: updated fixtures for new entity shape)

plan_context: Documentation Impact in plan: 'none here (surfaced in ST14/ST15 docs)' -- applies to feature/endpoint documentation.
The plan's 'none here' guidance is confirmed accurate for feature docs (no endpoint exposes bio/avatar yet).
However, docs/development/api-conventions.md maintains a synchronized migration list that must match reviewedMigrationClasses; this required updating.
convention_guidance: docs/README.md routing table: docs/development/api-conventions.md covers DB/migration conventions (read when adding/changing any migration).
The migration list in api-conventions.md is explicitly synchronized with reviewedMigrationClasses in database.config.ts.
AGENTS.md and .myteam/ files are not affected by this schema-only change.
Feature docs (auth.md, etc.) are not affected -- bio/avatar are not yet exposed via any endpoint.
